calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-26-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen Camber for Barbara Camber.

The Court stated that there was no opposition and everything appeared to be in order. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Shannon.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-12-2009 Continued To Jan-26-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Heirship Of Heirs Of Predeceased Spouse
Off Calendar May-16-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: George Holland appearing for petitioners. Stephen Camber appearing for administrator/respondent. Dana Lee, brother of deceased is also in court. Counsel were informed by Mr. Lee that he has evidence against the petition. Court wants Mr. Lee to show counsel what he have outside of court. At 10:15am, all parties return to court. Mr. Camber informs the court that Mr. Lee's documents support the petition. Mr. Lee argues that he lives in the property and he has been paying the bills. Matter submitted. Court advises Mr. Lee to get an attorney. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
